summary: Comprehensive testing of Solana Token Scanner completed. All backend APIs working correctly via localhost. Public URL had connectivity issues but backend services confirmed working. Frontend displays correctly with all features functional.

minor.issue: Intermittent connectivity timeouts from pytest tests to public URL, but direct curl to localhost works

passed_tests: GET /api/ - Returns 'Solana Token Scanner API' message
GET /api/tokens/scan - Returns filtered tokens (2 tokens matched criteria)
GET /api/tokens/latest - Returns empty array (no tokens meet strict criteria from boost endpoint)
POST /api/telegram/test - Sends test notification, returns holder_data and social_data
POST /api/tokens/check/{address} - Returns filter_checks with top10_holders_25pct field
GET /api/tokens/watch - Returns watched tokens list (3 tokens)
GET /api/notifications/history - Returns notification logs (3 recent notifications)
Frontend displays token table with LIVE indicator
Frontend shows 30-second countdown timer (verified counting down)
Frontend filter bar displays all 6 criteria correctly
Token rows clickable with external links to DexScreener/Solscan
Auto-refresh timer resets to 30 after reaching 0
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints working correctly. Telegram notifications confirmed sending (see notification_logs collection). Public URL may have intermittent connectivity - use localhost:8001 for backend testing. Frontend auto-refresh timer counts down from 30s and resets. Filter criteria: Vol ≥$600K, MCap $100K-$600K, Age 40-180m, Liq ≥$15K, Liq<50%MCap, Top10 Holders ≤25%.
